selections.name: Banker Bull
selections.reason: First-time starter draws the favorable outside post with Flavien Prat aboard, avoiding the rail bias.

selections.name: Al Mowashaah
selections.reason: Brad Cox trainee has solid works but must overcome the inside draw which can be tricky for a debut runner.

selections.name: Freedom Charge
selections.reason: Asmussen and Santana team up; pedigree suggests early speed which is needed from this inside post.

selections.name: Georgie's Warrior
selections.reason: Shows a few decent breezes but may need the experience against these top-tier barns.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #5, Exacta Box 1-5, Trifecta 1,5 / 1,2,5 / ALL

selections.name: Noble Heritage
selections.reason: Massive class drop from MSW to MCL. Owns the highest speed figures and draws perfectly outside.

selections.name: Capt Fluff N Stuff
selections.reason: Chad Brown drops this one into claiming ranks; figures are competitive but must navigate the rail.

selections.name: Twenty Two Black
selections.reason: McPeek runner has tactical speed and should get a clean stalking trip from the middle of the gate.

selections.name: Fess
selections.reason: Needs to improve on speed figures but could pick up the pieces for the bottom of exotics.

selections.name: Power Of Women
selections.reason: Dutrow trainee drops in class and has the tactical speed to control this race from the outset.

selections.name: So Vain
selections.reason: Linda Rice runner with Carmouche; consistent figures make her the logical alternative to the favorite.

selections.name: Icy Legs
selections.reason: Draws the outside post which is advantageous; capable of closing into the exotics.

selections.name: Ishkabibble
selections.reason: Figures are a bit light compared to the top pair, but can hit the board on best effort.

danger_horse.name: Caradise
danger_horse.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and the outside draw helps her chances at a price.

selections.name: Three Little Birds
selections.reason: Scratches to the inside speed open up the pace scenario perfectly for this runner to stalk and pounce.

selections.name: Magni
selections.reason: Consistent performer with solid speed figures; outside draw is a significant positive.

selections.name: Solomini's World
selections.reason: Gets the outermost post and Lezcano; should be rolling late if the pace gets hot.

selections.name: Majestic Arc
selections.reason: Veteran runner who can grab a share if the top choices falter.

selections.name: Fateful Lightning
selections.reason: Boasts the highest recent speed figures in this field and has tactical speed to sit a perfect trip.

selections.name: Alghero
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Franco; figures are very competitive and should appreciate the mile distance.

selections.name: Collado Hueco
selections.reason: First-time starter for Brown/Prat; pedigree suggests talent but the rail draw is a slight concern.

selections.name: Asked And Answered
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps him out of trouble; capable of hitting the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Ovechkin
danger_horse.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding; equipment change could spark sudden improvement.

selections.name: Whittington Park
selections.reason: Classy runner with elite speed figures for this level; Franco should work out a winning trip.

selections.name: Concorde Spirit
selections.reason: Consistent type who always fires; Carmouche will have him forwardly placed throughout.

selections.name: Shadow Dragon
selections.reason: Drops slightly in class and gets a favorable outside post to launch a sustained bid.

selections.name: Ez Roll
selections.reason: Outside draw is ideal; has the late pace figures to be a factor in the stretch.

danger_horse.name: Berning Beauty
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on his best day; dangerous if left alone on the lead.

selections.name: Cuando
selections.reason: Strong turf sprint figures and draws well outside, avoiding any inside traffic issues.

selections.name: Pivotal Moment
selections.reason: Clement is lethal in turf sprints; this runner has the late kick to run them down.

selections.name: Cyclonite
selections.reason: Casse trainee with Prat aboard; possesses high early speed to dictate the pace.

selections.name: Strate Cash
selections.reason: Outside draw is perfect for his stalking style; Franco will have him in the clear.

danger_horse.name: Learntodiscover (gb)
danger_horse.reason: European import could be sitting on a big effort in his second stateside start.

selections.name: In The Dark
selections.reason: Solid turf route figures and gets a ground-saving trip from the inside post.

selections.name: Chips And Fish
selections.reason: Tactical speed allows him to secure good position; figures are right there with the favorite.

selections.name: Snookie Bear
selections.reason: First start since being gelded; Jamie Ness barn is dangerous with these types.

selections.name: Chummers
selections.reason: Handal and Prat team up; should be closing late into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Middle Market
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could wake up at a price with Lezcano in the irons.
